name: Scatter
description: When a unit attacks a small based Trooper unit with an Attack Pool that has the Scatter keyword, after the attack is resolved, it may place any of the non-unit leader miniatures in the defending unit in Cohesion.
official_rules_text: When a unit attacks a small based Trooper unit with an Attack Pool that has the Scatter keyword, after the attack is resolved, it may place any of the non-unit leader miniatures in the defending unit in Cohesion.
